content: Task: Redesign TUI chart for futuristic trading terminal aesthetic. Phase 1: Research + Planning (parallel). Phase 2: Trading team implementation.

Research complete. Found: ratatui Chart/Canvas/Gauge/Sparkline widgets, tachyonfx effects crate, Tailwind/Material built-in palettes, Canvas Shape trait for custom candlesticks, HalfBlock markers for gradient fills. Doc Researcher + SDK Analyst ran in parallel.

Design complete. Architect produced: new layout (status bar + chart area with risk gauge sidebar + prices + tabbed orders/positions + footer), 4 chart views (Price Overlay, Spread History, Candlestick, P&L Equity), ChartView/TabView/OhlcBar data structures, cyberpunk Tailwind palette, keyboard interaction model. Spec Writer produced: 40+ acceptance criteria across 12 categories with edge cases.

Implementation complete. Rust Engine Dev rewrote tui.rs from 833 to 1903 lines. All 4 chart views, risk gauges, tabbed panel, new keyboard shortcuts, cyberpunk palette, OHLC aggregation, spread history, equity curve. cargo check + cargo clippy pass with zero arb-cli warnings. No Cargo.toml changes needed (ratatui 0.29 has all required widgets).
All phases complete. Research -> Planning -> Trading pipeline executed successfully. TUI chart redesign implemented and verified.
